backend/main.mo: Motoko canister handling user profiles, token balances, demo minting with limits, transfers, and permission checks via AccessControl.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented app features to involved frontend files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing each frontend file's purpose across UI, styling, and logic layers.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base and custom CSS variables defining the app’s color system, themes, and global styles.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML shell mounting the React app and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component controlling authentication flow, landing page, dashboard, and UI layout.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Login/logout button integrating Internet Identity with loading states and query cache clearing.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal prompting new users to enter and save their profile name after authentication.
frontend/src/components/payments/Balance: Displays the user's token balance and allows minting demo tokens when balance is zero, handling loading, errors, and success alerts.
frontend/src/components/payments/Dashboa: Wraps and arranges the balance card, payment form, and transaction history while greeting the user based on their profile.
frontend/src/components/payments/SendPay: Form for sending tokens with validation, balance checks, mutation handling, and success/error feedback.
frontend/src/components/payments/Transac: Fetches and displays a scrollable list of transactions, categorizing them as sent, received, or minted with icons and timestamps.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to Internet Identity, refreshing dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context, loading stored identities and exposing login, logout, and status states.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for user profile, balance, transactions, minting, and fund transfers using the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Configures Tailwind layers and defines light/dark theme CSS variables plus base styles.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Provides a cn helper that merges class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for reading, storing, and clearing URL and session parameters, including hash-based parsing.
frontend/src/utils/validation.ts: Validates principals and amounts and provides formatting helpers for both.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending theme colors, fonts, animations, and enabling plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing app goals, features, requirements, and pending feature requests.
